feed.title: blank
feed.subtitle: A simple, whitespace theme for academics. Based on [*folio](https://github.com/bogoli/-folio) design.

entry.title: Receiving the SNU OIA Scholarship
entry.content: I am thrilled to announce that I have been awarded the SNU OIA scholarship for the 2022-1 term. This scholarship represents a significant achievement in my academic journey, and I am grateful for the support and guidance provided by Dr. Ahn.

entry.title: SfN 2021 Presentation
entry.content: I am delighted to share that our work titled “Anodal tDCS over the dorsolateral prefrontal cortex modulates the balance between Pavlovian and instrumental systems in the punishment domain” was presented at SfN 2021. I extend my gratitude to all those who visited my poster session and expressed their interest in our research. For those who couldn’t attend, I invite you to explore the presentation slides, which can be accessed [provide link to presentation slides]. Additionally, a recording of the presentation is available for viewing [provide link to presentation video]. Thank you once again for your support and engagement with our study.
entry.summary: I am delighted to share that our work titled “Anodal tDCS over the dorsolateral prefrontal cortex modulates the balance between Pavlovian and instrumental systems in the punishment domain” was presented at SfN 2021. I extend my gratitude to all those who visited my poster session and expressed their interest in our research. For those who couldn’t attend, I invite you to explore the presentation slides, which can be accessed [provide link to presentation slides]. Additionally, a recording of the presentation is available for viewing [provide link to presentation video]. Thank you once again for your support and engagement with our study.

entry.title: Master graduation
entry.content: I am thrilled to announce the successful completion of my Master’s Degree, a remarkable achievement in my academic journey. As I bid farewell to the Master’s phase, I am eager to embrace the next chapter of my scholarly pursuit as I embark on the Ph.D. program. With a solid foundation and a deepened passion for research, I look forward to delving deeper into my field, engaging in cutting-edge research, and contributing to the advancement of knowledge.
entry.summary: I am thrilled to announce the successful completion of my Master’s Degree, a remarkable achievement in my academic journey. As I bid farewell to the Master’s phase, I am eager to embrace the next chapter of my scholarly pursuit as I embark on the Ph.D. program. With a solid foundation and a deepened passion for research, I look forward to delving deeper into my field, engaging in cutting-edge research, and contributing to the advancement of knowledge.
